examples.text: يَضُمُّ ٱلْقَامُوسُ ٱلْجَدِيدُ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ 130 أَلْفَ كَلِمَةٍ وَعِبَارَةٍ
examples.english: The new dictionary covers more than 130 thousand words and expressions

etymology.text: From Ancient Greek ὠκεανός (ōkeanós). Sense 1 stems from the title of Firuzabadi’s dictionary, the The Encompassing ὠκεανός, which became popular. Doublet of أُوقْيَانُوس (ʔūqyānūs).
